title: sapranthus campechianus
intro: Sapranthus campechianus, also known as Campeche alder or campeche tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Icacinaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Sapranthus campechianus include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves or roots, which can be dried, crushed, or boiled to create teas, infusions, or poultices for medicinal use.
